# butakov.dev — Alexander Butakov, IT Consultant

## Services
- Complex web services and startups (Django 5, Next.js 15)
- E-commerce on 1C-Bitrix with 1C:UT integration
- Digital marketing & Performance (Yandex Direct)
- Corporate WordPress sites
- Legacy support (Bitrix, WordPress)
- AI consulting — LLM and neural network integration

## Engineering Cases
- Cache Warmup Architecture for a 200k SKU Catalog (Server response 190ms)
- High-Load E-commerce Optimization: DB Locks, CRM Crashes and AI Bot Attacks (+40% server response speed)
- Multi-Region Architecture for a Bitrix E-commerce Store: 27 Cities on Subdomains (27 cities, 0 duplicates)
- Legacy Bitrix Adaptation for PHP 8: Fixing Core Errors and Admin Panel (100% admin panel stability)
- Redis Optimization for Bitrix: Background Tag Cleanup Without Session Loss (97% RAM freed)
- SPA Deployment: Fixing Build Conflicts and Infinite Redirect Loops (+14% form conversion)
- WordPress Recovery After Fatal Error During PHP 8.3 Migration (Uptime 99.99%)
